appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: Agent-Friendly Install UX section with testing steps for VAL-LAUNCH-006/007/008/009

notes: Flow validator subagents failed with environment permission errors (known infrastructure issue per AGENTS.md). All 4 assertions tested inline successfully.
